context: Evaluates whether the agent correctly manages interaction between two modules (Orders and Inventory) according to the 'Low Coupling' and 'Encapsulation' principles, specifically checking that communication happens only through public APIs.

checklist.name: Service-to-Service interaction
checklist.description: The 'Orders' module interacts with the 'Inventory' module only through its designated public service or API class.

checklist.name: No Repo Imports
checklist.description: The 'Orders' module does NOT import or call 'InventoryRepo', 'SqlInventoryRepository', or other implementation-level classes from the Inventory module.

checklist.name: No Model Imports
checklist.description: The 'Orders' module does NOT import internal data models (e.g. 'InventoryItemModel') from the Inventory module, using primitives or its own DTOs instead.
